zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Lanherne於1242年出生在英國可瓦爾藍黑爾時，她的父親John Delanherne27歲，母親Margaret FitzJohn24歲。她去世於大約1283年在威爾士格拉莫爾根馬可享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Lanherne was born in 1242, in Lanherne, Cornwall, England, her father, John Delanherne, was 27 and her mother, Margaret FitzJohn, was 24. She died about 1283, in Penmark, Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Lanherne est née en 1242, à Lanherne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, John Delanherne, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret FitzJohn, avait 24 ans. Elle est décédée environ 1283, à Penmark, Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Lanherne 1242 in Lanherne, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Delanherne 27 und ihre Mutter Margaret FitzJohn 24. Sie starb um 1283 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Penmark, Glamorgan, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Lanherne è nata il nel 1242 nel Lanherne, Cornwall, England, sua padre, John Delanherne, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Margaret FitzJohn, aveva 24 anni. Morì circa 1283, nel Penmark, Glamorgan, Galles, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Lanherneが1242年にイギリスコルンワルランハーンで生まれた時，父John Delanherneは27歳，母Margaret FitzJohnは24歳であった。彼女は約1283年にウェールズグラモーガンペンマークで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Lanherne(이)가 1242년 영국 코른월 랜헤른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Delanherne(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret FitzJohn(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1283년 웨일스 글램르건 펜마크에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Lanherne родилась в 1242 г. в местности ланирн, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени John Delanherne было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret FitzJohn, 24. Она умерла около 1283 г. в местности пенмарк, глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Lanherne nació en 1242, en Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, John Delanherne, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret FitzJohn, tenía 24 años. Murió aproximadamente 1283, en Penmark, Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 42 años.
